Transcript.Content: Hello, thank you for calling TechCo support. My name is John. How can I help you today?
Hi John. Im having issues with my internet connection. It keeps dropping every few minutes.
Im sorry to hear that. Let me look into this for you. Can you tell me your account number?
Thank you. I can see there was a service disruption in your area. Let me reset your connection from our end.
Done! Your connection should be stable now. Is there anything else I can help with?
No, thats all. Thank you for the quick help!
Youre welcome! Have a great day.
